purpose: pull current AGENTS.md and README.md files back into the skill-side registry after product-side changes
stage_runtime_rules: collect treats external current state as the source for collected snapshots
collect must refresh registry.json so registry becomes the machine-readable branch index
index.md may be refreshed for human audit, but it is not the primary runtime source

source_of_truth.agents_runtime: target-contract runtime JSON remains the runtime source of truth
source_of_truth.external_snapshots: current external AGENTS.md and README.md files
